meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve 'Can't Finish Projects'
content.seo_description: Master user onboarding to solve the 'can't finish projects' cycle. An intermediate guide for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code to drive retention.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of early user momentum. By implementing high-velocity, automated onboarding, you force immediate 'Aha!' moments. This bridges the gap between feature development and user retention, ensuring your MVP generates the revenue necessary to sustain ongoing product iteration and long-term project completion.
content.intro:
You have a graveyard of half-baked repositories and abandoned SaaS ideas. The problem isn't your coding ability; it's the invisible wall between 'feature complete' and 'user validated.' When users don't see value in the first sixty seconds, they churn, and your motivation dies with them. You aren't failing to build; you are failing to onboard.

True velocity comes from automating the path to value. By treating onboarding as a primary technical feature rather than a post-launch afterthought, you transform your product from a brittle prototype into a revenue-generating machine. It is time to stop building features for ghosts and start building flows that convert.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that proves value to your user. If they don't hit this milestone, the project is effectively dead. We will map this to a database flag.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core value proposition of this SaaS and generate a schema update for a 'user_milestone' table that tracks completion of the primary activation task.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create migration for user_milestone tracking table'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Progress Tracking
steps.description: Users feel overwhelmed by blank canvases. Create a progress-based UI component that guides them through setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable React progress component that tracks user onboarding completion percentage based on API data.

steps.title: Automate Contextual Email Triggers
steps.description: If a user stalls, the system must intervene. Connect your application state to an email service provider to nudge them back into the flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service layer function in Node.js that triggers a transactional email via Resend when a user hits a 24-hour inactivity window during onboarding.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Implement inactivity trigger service using Resend SDK'

steps.title: Build a Frictionless 'First Action' Flow
steps.description: Strip away all requirements that aren't strictly necessary for the user to see the product value. Use pre-filled data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current sign-up flow to include a 'Demo Mode' that populates the user dashboard with mock data upon registration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add Demo Mode capability to the initial sign-up workflow'

steps.title: Feedback Loop Integration
steps.description: Embed a simple micro-survey immediately after the 'Aha!' moment to validate if the user understood the value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lightweight feedback modal that appears only after the 'user_milestone' flag is set to true.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add feedback modal triggered by milestone completion'

pro_tips: Never ask for payment before the user has experienced the 'Aha!' moment.
Use 'Time-to-Value' (TTV) as your North Star metric instead of daily active users.
Implement a skeleton screen for your onboarding flow to make the app feel faster than it is.
Always allow users to 'Skip' onboarding, but track how many skip it to identify flow friction.
Personalize the dashboard greeting using the data collected during the first 30 seconds of signup.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a cohort analysis on the first 50 users, and iterate based on where they drop off in the funnel.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your best ideas die in the editor. By mastering the onboarding loop, you secure your revenue and your sanity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
